reasoning: The control AC-2 (5) - Account Management | Inactivity Logout is focused on managing user session inactivity and enforcing logout after a period of inactivity. This is typically implemented at the IAM or application level, where user sessions are managed. Kubernetes does not natively manage user sessions in the same way as cloud IAM services or application platforms. Instead, Kubernetes focuses on API access control, which is managed through tokens and certificates that do not inherently support inactivity logout. Therefore, there is no direct equivalent in Kubernetes for this control.
title: Account Management | Inactivity Logout
